# apicurio_artifact_rule (Data Source)

The `apicurio_artifact_rule` data source allows you to retrieve the configuration of a specific rule applied to an artifact in the Apicurio Registry.

## Example Usage

```hcl
data "apicurio_artifact_rule" "example" {
  group_id    = "default"
  artifact_id = "user-schema"
  type        = "VALIDITY"
}

output "rule_config" {
  value = data.apicurio_artifact_rule.example.config
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `artifact_id` (String) The unique ID of the artifact.
- `type` (String) The type of the rule (e.g., `VALIDITY`, `COMPATIBILITY`).

### Optional

- `group_id` (String) The ID of the artifact group. If not provided, it defaults to `default`.

### Read-Only

- `config` (String) The configuration value for the rule. Valid values depend on the rule `type`:
  - For `COMPATIBILITY`: `BACKWARD`, `BACKWARD_TRANSITIVE`, `FORWARD`, `FORWARD_TRANSITIVE`, `FULL`, `FULL_TRANSITIVE`, `NONE`
  - For `VALIDITY`: `FULL`, `SYNTAX_ONLY`, `NONE`
- `id` (String) The composite ID of the artifact rule, formatted as `group_id/artifact_id/type`.
